description_long: This object consists of a group of five traffic cones of varying heights and base sizes, arranged in a line. The cones are predominantly orange with wide black bands and show significant signs of wear, including dirt, fading, and scuff marks. The two largest cones have square, heavy black bases, while the three smaller cones have lighter, thinner square or round bases. Each cone features one or more reflective silver stripes around the upper section, enhancing visibility. The tips of the cones are mostly pointed, with some showing yellow or black caps. The overall appearance suggests these cones have been used extensively in outdoor urban environments, such as roadsides or construction zones.
description: A group of five worn, orange traffic cones with black bases and reflective stripes, showing visible dirt and fading from heavy outdoor use.
description_view_0: Five traffic cones are visible from the side, showing their varying heights, orange color, black bases, and reflective stripes.
description_view_1: The cones are viewed from the top down the line, making their pointed tips and the alignment of their bases prominent.
description_view_2: The cones are seen from the opposite side, again highlighting their height differences, base shapes, and the reflective bands.
description_view_3: A direct end-on view of the cones, emphasizing the pointed tips and the thickness of the two largest bases.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Each cone has one or two wide, silver reflective stripes placed near the upper third of the cone. The stripes are approximately 5-8 cm wide and encircle the cone.
attribute_tip_design: The tips are pointed, with some featuring a yellow or black cap. The tips are solid and slightly rounded at the very end.
attribute_base_design: The two largest cones have thick, square, heavy black rubber bases for stability, while the smaller cones have thinner, lighter square or round bases. The bases show ribbing and wear patterns.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on any of the cones.
attribute_condition: The cones are worn, dirty, and faded, with visible scuff marks and signs of heavy outdoor use.
